title: Santhaikku Vantha Kili Lyrics Dharma Durai(1991)
stanzas: <div>Santhaikku Vantha Kili Lyrics From Dharma Durai(1991)

Santhaikku vandha kili
jaada solli pesuthadi

muthamma muthamma
pakkam vara vetkama (2)

kuthaaluthu maanu
kothu poovaadidum
thaene (2)

Santhaikku vandha kili
jaada solli pesuthadi

kaanaatha kaatchiyellaam
kandaen un azhagil
pooppola kolamellaam
pottaaye un vizhiyil

maanaa madhuraiyila
malliga poo vaangi vandhu
mai poattu mayakkiniye
kai therndha machaane

thamaraiyum poothirichu
thakkaali pazhuthurichu
thangame un manasu
innum pazhukkalaye

ippave sondham kondu
nee kaiyil allikollu
maamaa.

Santhaikku vandha machaan
jaada solli pesuvathen (2)

sollavaa sollavaa
onnu naan sollavaa (2)

kalyaanatha pesi
nee katta venum thaali (2)

Santhaikku vandha machaan
jaada solli pesuvathen (2)

aalaana naal muthalaai
unnathaan naan nenachi
noolaagathaan elachi
noyil thinam vaadi ninnen

poomudikkum koondhalile
emmanasa nee mudicha
nee mudicha mudippinile
en usuru thinam thavikka

poovil nalla thaenirukku
ponvandu paathirukku
innum enna thaamathamo
maamanukku sammadhamo

ippave sontham kollave
konjam ennarugil vaamaa

Santhaikku vandha kili
jaada solli pesuthadi
Santhaikku vandha machaan
jaada solli pesuvathen

muthamma muthamma
pakkam vara vetkama
sollavaa sollavaa
onnu naan sollavaa

kalyaanatha pesi
nee katta venum thaali .
kuthaaluthu maanu
kothu poovaadidum
thaene.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Santhaikku Vantha Kili expresses themes of love and longing, capturing the beauty of romantic moments.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Dharma Durai, this song plays during a pivotal romantic scene, enhancing the emotional depth of the characters' relationship.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by the legendary S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and composed by Ilaiyaraaja.

When was the song released?

Santhaikku Vantha Kili was released on January 14, 1991.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Santhaikku Vantha Kili, the listener is enveloped in a soothing melody that reflects the beauty of love and longing. The song's heartfelt lyrics and S. P. Balasubrahmanyam's soulful rendition evoke a sense of nostalgia and warmth. Set against the backdrop of Dharma Durai, it enhances the romantic moments between the lead characters. This classic piece remains a cherished favorite among fans of Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Santhaikku Vantha Kili from Dharma Durai is a timeless melody that captures the essence of romance and nostalgia. With the enchanting voice of S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and the masterful composition by Ilaiyaraaja, this song takes listeners on a heartfelt journey. Experience the magic of this classic that resonates with emotions and memories.
stanzaMeanings: The bird that came to the festival is talking sweetly.
The precious one is coming without hesitation.
The playful person is like a flower, sweet as honey.
The bird that came to the festival is talking sweetly.
I have seen all the sights, like flowers in your beautiful eyes.
I brought jasmine flowers from Madurai and offered them to you, my dear.
The lotus has bloomed, and the tomato has ripened, yet your heart is still unripe.
Now you have taken the bond in your hands, my dear.
I am the one who speaks sweetly at the festival.
Should I say it, should I say it, should I say it once?
You need to speak about marriage and tie the sacred thread.
I am the one who speaks sweetly at the festival.
I remember the first day, I thought of you as a thread in my life, and I will suffer for you every day.
In the flower's curls, you are the one who binds me, and you will take my breath away every day.
In the garden, there is good honey, and what else is there for the golden vessel? Is there peace for my uncle?
Now, should I take the bond a little closer to me?
The bird that came to the festival is talking sweetly. The bird that came to the festival is speaking sweetly.
The precious one is coming without hesitation. Should I say it, should I say it, should I say it once?
You need to speak about marriage and tie the sacred thread. The playful person is like a flower, sweet as honey.
